name: E55 Autonomous Intelligence Agent — n8n Webhook Configurations
description: Webhook endpoints and workflow triggers for n8n/Make.com integration

prospect_discovered.description: Triggered when a new prospect is discovered from any issue group

payload_schema.content: text (optional) — original post/comment that triggered discovery

enrichment_complete.description: Triggered after waterfall enrichment completes for a prospect
enrichment_complete.n8n_trigger: Supabase Trigger (on UPDATE e55_enrichment_queue WHERE pipeline_status='complete')
downstream_actions: IF donor_propensity_score > 70: Create donor_cultivation outreach sequence
Update golden record with enriched data
Generate pre-call briefing if meeting scheduled

newsletter_escalation.description: Triggered when a newsletter subscriber hits the auto-escalation threshold (5+ opens, 3+ clicks)
newsletter_escalation.n8n_trigger: Supabase Trigger (on UPDATE e55_newsletter_tracking WHERE auto_escalation_triggered=true)

news_cycle_event.description: Triggered when a news cycle event is registered
downstream_actions: Activate related directories for all agents with news_cycle_auto=true
Queue newsletter blast to all affected subscribers

inbox_message.description: Triggered when a new inbound message arrives in the unified inbox
inbox_message.n8n_trigger: Supabase Trigger (on INSERT e55_unified_inbox WHERE direction='inbound')
downstream_actions: IF intent=donation_intent AND urgency=high: Alert candidate immediately
IF intent=volunteer_offer: Create volunteer onboarding sequence
IF intent=complaint: Flag for candidate review

connector_identified.description: Triggered when a super-connector is identified (score > 50)
connector_identified.n8n_trigger: Supabase Trigger (on INSERT/UPDATE e55_connector_scores WHERE connector_score >= 50)

capacity_signal_detected.description: Triggered when a new wealth/capacity signal is detected
capacity_signal_detected.n8n_trigger: Supabase Trigger (on INSERT e55_capacity_signals WHERE capacity_impact='strong_positive')
downstream_actions: IF capacity upgrades to major_donor: Create donor_cultivation sequence
Compare new matches vs previous run

prospect_pipeline.description: Full prospect discovery → enrichment → outreach pipeline

news_cycle_reactor.description: News event → group activation → newsletter blast → outreach

config.prompt: Classify this news for political campaign relevance...

enrichment_batch_processor.description: Batch process enrichment queue every 15 minutes

modules: HTTP Request → Supabase Search → Router → Supabase Insert → Email
prospect_discovery_pipeline.description: Same as n8n prospect pipeline but for Make.com

modules: Supabase Query → Aggregator → Text Aggregator → Email
daily_intelligence_digest.description: Daily summary email to candidate with new prospects, news events, inbox highlights
